_doc: Errands tileset-bank diagnosis (ckpt 131): per-flip read of the pool slots for banks 0x186/0x187/0x188 (the errands floor uses bank_20=0x188).  Pool table = &DAT_008a760c (slot-ptr array); slot[bank] addr = 0x8a760c + bank*4 (0x186->0x8a7c24, 0x187->0x8a7c28, 0x188->0x8a7c2c).  Slot fields: width@+0x20, height@+0x24, f_38(frame count)@+0x38, resource_id@+0x40.  Goal: learn what retail's bank 0x188 IS at the errands render (the port boot-clones it to res 0x76b = 1 frame, but retail renders frame 11 -> retail re-registers it).  room_key filters the errands (0x334dc).  Run: nix develop --command python3 tools/frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/control-path-gt/nav.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/errands_tileset_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --run-dir runs/errands-tileset-gt --duration-ms 240000

0x5b8fc0.name: flip
0x5b8fc0._note: DDraw Flip (once/frame). Read the errands tileset bank slots + room_key.
